description: Simplifies algebraic expressions using Algebrite symbolic computation
utility: Reduce expressions to simplest form: 2*x+3*x → 5*x, x^2/x → x, 6/8 → 3/4

arguments.name: expression
arguments.description: Quoted mathematical expression to simplify, may contain variables from context

alternates: simplify("a*x + a*x") - uses current value of variable a
